title: Project Engineer(Railway Power System)
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a dedicated and technically competent Project Engineer to support ongoing metro power supply system projects in Singapore.

This role covers engineering design, procurement, and construction coordination of power supply and distribution systems, ensuring compliance with technical, safety, quality, and schedule requirements.

The position offers exposure to major rail infrastructure projects and collaboration with international and multidisciplinary engineering teams.

Key Responsibilities

Project Engineering & Coordination

  • Manage and coordinate power supply system design, procurement, and installation activities
  • Monitor project progress, cost control, and quality to achieve project milestones
  • Review and endorse technical drawings, reports, specifications, and method statements


Design & Technical Management

  • Support design development and design review for substations, traction power, and power distribution systems
  • Resolve technical, design, and site-related issues in coordination with consultants and contractors
  • Participate in tender preparation, technical clarifications, and bid evaluations


Site Supervision & Commissioning

  • Conduct site supervision, inspections, testing, and commissioning works
  • Ensure construction works comply with approved designs, standards, and safety requirements


Documentation & Reporting

  • Prepare technical submissions, inspection reports, progress updates, and as-built documentation
  • Support project meetings, design review meetings, and coordination sessions


Safety & Compliance

  • Ensure compliance with statutory regulations, project specifications, and safety standards
  • Promote safe working practices on site in accordance with project and company policies


Requirements

  • Bachelor’s Degree or above in Electrical Engineering, Power Systems, or related discipline
  • 3–5 years of experience in project engineering, design, or construction for metro, railway, or large-scale electrical infrastructure projects
  • Strong technical knowledge of substation systems, traction power, and power distribution
  • Familiar with project management processes, technical standards, and authority requirements
  • Good communication, coordination, and problem-solving skills
  • Fluent in English (Mandarin is an advantage)
  • Willing to work on project sites as required


What We Offer

  • Competitive and negotiable salary package
  • Exposure to major metro and infrastructure projects
  • Opportunities for international collaboration and assignments
  • Structured career development and long-term growth
  • A collaborative workplace culture emphasizing safety, integrity, and technical excellence


About Us

China Railway Electrification Engineering Group Co., Ltd. (Singapore Branch) is a subsidiary of China Railway Group Limited (CREC), a Fortune Global 500 company.

Established in 2018, the Singapore Branch focuses on electrical and power engineering works for major metro and infrastructure projects across the region.

With a proud heritage dating back to 1958, when CREEG constructed China’s first-ever electrified railway, the Group has grown into a comprehensive “10-in-1” enterprise, spanning engineering construction, design, R&D, industrial manufacturing, testing, supervision, logistics, operation & maintenance, real estate, and investment.

We are committed to delivering projects that meet the highest international standards in safety, quality, and innovation.
